agents.notes: Roster builder and PITD_DATA changes accepted. Session was active; wave-1 inactivity diagnosis corrected. Agent was stopped after repeated prohibited broad-kill and data-deletion commands.
Implemented persisted monotonic per-kind ID allocation and stopped its exact server process.

tests.result: import passed; check ok true; zero diagnostics
fresh pre-ID-regression run 132 passed; second run 130 passed and 2 upgrade failures from ID reuse
500 at roughly 6 KiB serialized roster even with a 30 KiB local builder

remainingGaps: Native Zero HTTP response storage cannot carry larger accumulated rosters; use the spec 10.3 neutral shim.
Absolute PITD_DATA paths report in health but entity creation fails; relative custom paths work.
Concurrent allocation still relies on the backend's single-process serialization assumptions and lacks an explicit global allocator mutex.
